title: Kim Novak Never Swam in Genesaret's Lake
original_title: Kim Novak badade aldrig i Genesarets sjö
overview: 14-year old Erik gets sent to live with his older brother, Henry, during the summer as his mother is dying in cancer. Henry starts dating Ewa, who is married to Berra. A few days after Ewa shows up battered and bruised from an altercation with Berra, he is found dead on a nearby parking lot.

trailers.title: Kim Novak badete nie im See von Genezareth - Trailer
